title: Smoky Sweet Potato and Date Hash
description: A hearty, one-pot hash made with roasted sweet potatoes, caramelized dates, and a hint of smokiness.

ingredients.name: stir-fry oil
ingredients.notes: such as coconut or avocado oil

instructions: Pierce the sweet potatoes several times with a fork and roast for 45-50 minutes, or until tender.
In a large skillet, heat the stir-fry oil over medium-high heat.
Add the glazed irish and stir constantly for 2-3 minutes, or until fragrant.
Add the roasted sweet potatoes and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, breaking them up with a spatula.
Add the dates and smoky paprika, and stir-fry for an additional 2 minutes, until the dates are caramelized.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
